statistics.stat: FHA denial rates predict FHA delinquency rates two years ahead (r=+0.618).
Unemployment correlates inversely with mortgage denial rates (r=-0.696) — the Recession Paradox.
Fed SLOOS survey responses show near-zero correlation with actual HMDA denial behavior (r=-0.150).
Rocket Mortgage's FHA denial rate jumps +54.9pp above 85% LTV; Mr. Cooper's jumps +1.7pp (2025 HMDA).
Identical high-risk FHA profiles face 26.7% denial at Mr. Cooper vs 91.2% at Rocket — a 64.5pp spread.
Shock Beta: pre-shock volatility predicted lender tightening response at r=+0.946; placebo easing episode confirmed at r=-0.605.
UWM's FHA denial rate rose from 16.2% (2022) to 21.8% (2025) — a 35% increase.
